      function OptanonWrapper() {
        if (window.__HAS_APPLIED_CONSENT__) {
          return; // Prevent re-application of consent
        }
        // Read tracking-authorized parameter from URL
        var urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
        var trackingParam = urlParams.get('tracking-authorized');
        var consentChoice = trackingParam === 'true' ? true : trackingParam === 'false' ? false : undefined;
        if (consentChoice === true) {
          window.__HAS_APPLIED_CONSENT__  = true;
          OneTrust.AllowAll();
          return;
        } else if (consentChoice === false) {
          window.__HAS_APPLIED_CONSENT__  = true;
          OneTrust.RejectAll();
          return;
        }
        if(window.__IS_NATIVE__){
          window.__HAS_APPLIED_CONSENT__= true;
          OneTrust.RejectAll(); //Deny all categories
        }
      }
    </script>

window.throttleScrollEvents = () => {
  var currentScrollPos = window.pageYOffset;

  if (!ticking) {
    window.requestAnimationFrame(function () {
      customFeedbackButtonOnScroll(currentScrollPos);
      ticking = false;
    });

    ticking = true;
  }
}

window.customFeedbackButtonOnScroll = (currentScrollPos) => {
  var limit = Math.max(
    document.body.scrollHeight,
    document.body.offsetHeight,
    document.documentElement.clientHeight,
    document.documentElement.scrollHeight,
    document.documentElement.offsetHeight
  );

  if (customFeedbackButton !== null) {
    if (lastScrollPosition > currentScrollPos || currentScrollPos < 0) {
      customFeedbackButton.style.right = "0";
    } else {
      if (currentScrollPos > 300 && currentScrollPos <= limit) {
        customFeedbackButton.style.right = "-48px";
      }
    }

    lastScrollPosition = currentScrollPos;
  }
}

// --- 2. Helper to create minimized button + CSS once ---
function createSierraMinimizedButton() {

  // Inject CSS for the minimized button
  var css = [
    "#sierraMinimizedChatButton {",
    "  position: fixed;",
    "  right: 0;",
    "  bottom: 0;",
    "  z-index: 9999;",
    "  background-color: #e6005c;",

    "  border-color: #cc0052;",
    "}"
  ].join("\n");

  btn.style.display = "none"; // shown only after first close
  btn.onclick = function () {
    openSierraChat();
  };
 
  document.body.appendChild(btn);
}

  }
